# SmartPicksAI - AI-Powered Product Reviews & Comparisons

## About
SmartPicksAI is an independent product review and comparison website. We help shoppers find the best affordable products on Amazon (under $53 USD / 200 SAR). Our reviews are based on real customer ratings, sales volume, and detailed feature analysis.

## What We Cover
We review and compare affordable, high-rated Amazon products across these categories:
- Electronics & Accessories: chargers, cables, phone cases, earbuds, adapters
- Home & Kitchen: organizers, kitchen tools, cleaning supplies, storage
- Health & Beauty: skincare, supplements, personal care, grooming
- Office Supplies: pens, notebooks, desk accessories, organizers

## Our Methodology
Every product we recommend meets these criteria:
- Price: Under $53 USD (200 SAR)
- Rating: 4.0+ stars on Amazon
- Reviews: 500+ verified customer reviews
- Availability: Prime eligible / free shipping

## Content Structure
- /electronics/ - Electronics & accessories reviews and comparisons
- /home/ - Home & kitchen product guides
- /health/ - Health & beauty product reviews
- /office/ - Office supplies comparisons
- /compare/ - Head-to-head product comparisons

## Best Content
[Updated monthly with top-performing articles]
